# Two-Lane Phase 4 case register

`test_two_lane_general_facility.py` contains method-conformance (non-published)
facility cases with independently asserted Step 11 length-weighting identities:

| Case | Classification | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| general | method_conformance_case | Three different-length Passing Constrained/Zone segments and stable nonnumeric IDs |
| two lanes | method_conformance_case | Explicit roles, nearest-lane reset, and no adjustment after an explicit break |
| malformed | negative validation | Empty facility, duplicate IDs, orphan downstream context, and entering-less Passing Lane |

Published Examples 3 and 4 remain `published_reference_case` tests in the
existing Chapter 26 regression suite. Additional Phase 4 scenarios (curves,
nonlevel, capacity boundary) reuse the independently verified Phase 1–3
segment conformance cases when composed into a facility; no expected value is
generated by the facility method under test.
